title: Nothing OS 4.1(PacmanPro-B4.1-260609-1926-IND)
description:
What's New in This Update New Features

🪄 Lock screen customisation now supports Depth effect (Beta) and adjustable clock face sizes and alignments.
🎴 Depth effect (Beta) is now compatible with Atmosphere wallpapers.
🎧 The status bar now displays the dedicated icon of Nothing headphones when connected.

General Improvements and Bug Fixes

🌌 Improved Launcher animations for a smoother and more fluid experience.
🔐 Added a security reminder for the face unlock method.
⚙️ Enhanced overall system stability.
🛡️ Updated to June 2026 security patch.

Notes:
Your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. Performance will return to normal after the update is complete.
